clusters.competency_name: Marriage, Civil Partnership, and Family Structures
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand the legal status of marriage and civil partnership, family dynamics, and characteristics of successful parenting.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Marriage, Civil Partnership, and Family Structures
Marriage, Civil Partnership, and Family Structures
Marriage, Civil Partnership, and Family Structures

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand and apply principles of consent, trust, respect, and ethical behaviour in romantic relationships.
The ability to treat others with respect, develop positive self-esteem, and communicate effectively in relationships.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Respectful Treatment of Self and Others

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to recognise bullying, respond appropriately, and manage relationship endings with kindness.
The ability to recognise how stereotypes, prejudice, and power imbalances affect relationships and behaviour.
The ability to protect personal information, understand public versus private online spaces, and navigate social media critically.
The ability to understand the risks and legal implications of sharing intimate images online.

clusters.competency_name: Deepfakes, Harmful Content, and Online Harms
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to identify deepfakes, recognise harmful online content, and understand how technology can be misused.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Deepfakes, Harmful Content, and Online Harms

clusters.competency_name: Online Scams, Data Privacy, and Emerging Technology Risks
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to recognise online scams, understand data sharing practices, and critically evaluate emerging technologies.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Online Scams, Data Privacy, and Emerging Technology Risks
Online Scams, Sextortion, and Emerging Technology Risks
Online Scams, Sextortion, and AI Risks

clusters.competency_name: Consent, Boundaries, and Pressure in Relationships
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to communicate consent and boundaries, and to recognise and resist pressure in relationships.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Consent, Boundaries, and Pressure in Relationships
Consent, Boundaries, and Pressure in Relationships

clusters.competency_name: Personal Safety and Recognising Unsafe Relationships
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to assess trustworthiness, recognise unsafe relationships, and employ strategies to increase personal safety.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Personal Safety and Recognising Unsafe Relationships
Recognising Unsafe Relationships and Personal Safety

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand definitions, laws, and impacts of sexual harassment, violence, domestic abuse, and exploitation.
The ability to understand laws and dangers related to FGM, strangulation, and harmful practices depicted in pornography.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Pornography, Harmful Behaviours, and Seeking Support

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand that sex can be positive, that consent is ongoing, and that ethical sexual behaviour requires kindness.

clusters.competency_name: Contraception, Pregnancy Options, and Sexual Health
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand contraceptive choices, pregnancy options, STI prevention, and where to access sexual health services.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Contraception, Pregnancy Options, and Sexual Health
Sexually Transmitted Infections and Sexual Health Support

clusters.competency_name: Emotional Wellbeing and Mental Health Literacy
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to articulate emotions, understand normal feelings versus mental health conditions, and recognise factors affecting wellbeing.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Emotional Wellbeing and Mental Health Literacy
Emotional Wellbeing and Mental Health Literacy
Emotional Wellbeing and Mental Health Literacy

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand how gambling, alcohol, drugs, and smoking affect mental health.
The ability to manage screen time, critically evaluate online information, and seek support for online harms.

clusters.competency_name: Diet, Physical Health, and Disease Prevention
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand links between diet, weight, and health risks including cardiovascular disease and cancer.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Diet, Physical Health, and Disease Prevention

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand the risks and laws related to illegal drugs, alcohol, tobacco, and vaping.

clusters.competency_name: Infection Prevention, Dental Health, and Screening
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand infection treatment, oral hygiene, self-examination, and vaccination.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Infection Prevention, Dental Health, and Screening

clusters.competency_name: Sleep, Reproductive Health, and Accessing Healthcare
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand sleep hygiene, reproductive health, and how to access appropriate healthcare services.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Sleep, Reproductive Health, and Accessing Healthcare

clusters.competency_name: Personal Safety, Risk Management, and Peer Influence
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to manage personal safety in independent situations, recognise peer influence, and respond to conflict.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Personal Safety, Risk Management, and Peer Influence

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand misconceptions about weapons, recognise grooming and exploitation, and seek appropriate help.
The ability to understand menstrual health conditions, fertility, menopause, and when to seek healthcare support.
The ability to understand when and how to perform CPR and basic first aid.
